audio_description: The audio clip features a clear, high-pitched voice with a steady, moderate pace and no noticeable background noise.
temporal_description: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt and dark tie, is shown in a close-up against a green-tiled wall. He remains still, with his gaze directed slightly downward. The scene transitions to another man in a dark suit and tie, seated and looking down, then slowly raising his head. He extends his arm forward, then turns his head slightly to the side. The final shot shows an older man in a dark suit with a patterned bow tie, standing still with his head slightly tilted downward, his gaze fixed forward.
